Notice that any 'O' connected to a border 'O' cannot be captured.
Start by iterating over all cells on the border. If an 'O' is found on the border, perform DFS or BFS from it to mark all connected 'O' cells as safe (e.g., change them temporarily to 'S').
After exploring all border 'O's and their connected components, any remaining 'O's in the grid must be surrounded and should be flipped to 'X'.
Finally, restore all safe 'S' cells back to 'O'.
